mechanics.excerpt: The round of combat considered Complex Action only for the attacker Ithe character who initiated the round)- Some special maneuvers are used only by the attacker (the character taking Complex Action to initiate the melee attack) while others are used only by the defender (the character being attacked) Inese cases the maneuver will listed attack" detense Unless specifically stated otherwise , all effects inflicted are addition to standard damage.
